Refined denoiser GUI, clearer version display, and automated Windows release uploads.

### Highlights

- **UI** — Status summary strip, destination preview in the action bar, collapsible advanced settings, and shared configuration scroll area
- **Version** — Window title and About dialog show the installed package version
- **Fix** — Skip redundant AOV scans when the input path has not changed
- **Docs** — README screenshot and documentation links

### Windows portable

Download the attached `h-denoise-windows-x64-v*.zip`, extract, and run `h-denoise.exe`. No Python install required.
